title: Open Mic Poetry Night
description: Our first open mic night brought together poets and storytellers from across the city. The crowd was warm, the coffee was hot, and the words were unforgettable.

title: Valentine's Special Tasting
description: We celebrated love with a special cherry-infused coffee tasting paired with homemade chocolate truffles. It was a night to remember!

title: Live Acoustic Night
description: Join us for a cozy evening of live acoustic music featuring local artists. Enjoy your favorite coffee drinks while listening to soulful melodies under warm string lights.

title: Latte Art Workshop
description: Learn the art of latte design from our head barista. This hands-on workshop covers hearts, rosettas, and tulips — perfect for beginners and coffee enthusiasts alike.

title: Cherry's Board Game Brunch
description: Grab your friends for a morning of board games, freshly baked pastries, and unlimited brewed coffee. We've got over 50 games to choose from!
